name: sm_assets
query:
SELECT a.id, a.asset_name, a.sector_id, count(*) as number_of_sensors,
sum(case when s.alert_level > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as number_of_alerts,
max(s.alert_level) AS alert_level
FROM sm_assets a
INNER JOIN sm_sensors s ON a.id = s.asset_id
GROUP BY  a.id, a.asset_name, a.sector_id;
